raw_consumer_statement:
Barclay 's bank has a {$6500.00} fraud charge on my card. 
After I made my last payment on the credit card for XXXX, Barclay 's decided to add 2 new charges for {$1000.00} each- totaling {$2000.00}. Barclays said this is from the same company, XXXX, that stole the other {$6500.00}. These are double charges. Double charges they gave back to me after complaining for 3 months!!! Why did they do this? 
Even the company XXXX emailed Barclays Criminal Subpoena email address and said they took {$6500.00} not {$8500.00}. They have also charged me interest. 

Mastercard  Corporate Arbitration informed me I am 100 % protected and am not responsible for the fraud charges, so when I do not pay for any of this, Barclays can not ruin my perfect credit score.

But Barclay 's should be in very big trouble for continuing to double charge me fraud charges!
